Join Our Service

Edit Template

Africa Rise Safaris |

From Kilimanjaro Summits to Serengeti Safaris.

We’re your gateway to the most iconic and diverse experiences in East Africa, offering personalized journeys for every traveler. As Moshi and Arusha’s top-rated safari operator, your safety and satisfaction are our priority every step of the way.

About Us

AFRICA RISE SAFARIS

AFRICA RISE SAFARIS is a registered and trusted tour operator based in Moshi, Kilimanjaro, Tanzania, specializing in creating unforgettable travel experiences across East Africa. The company focuses on providing tailor-made and group tours that combine wildlife adventure, cultural discovery, mountain trekking, and beach holidays. With a passionate and experienced team, Africa Rise Safaris offers personalized safaris to iconic destinations like Serengeti National Park, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara, and the famous Mount Kilimanjaro. Their services also extend to the beautiful islands of Zanzibar and to regional neighbors including Kenya, Uganda, and Rwanda.

The company is committed to sustainable tourism that supports local communities and conserves the natural environment. Whether you’re looking for a budget camping safari, a luxury lodge experience, or a challenging trek to Africa’s highest peak, Africa Rise Safaris ensures every journey is safe, well-planned, and full of meaningful encounters. Their offerings include wildlife safaris, Kilimanjaro and Mount Meru climbs, cultural village tours, beach escapes, bird watching, the Great Migration expeditions, and short day trips for travelers with limited time.

Explore More

Choose Your Tanzania Safari Packages

Find the perfect safari to match your style and budget. From budget camping to luxury lodges, our Tanzania safari packages take you to top destinations like Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, and Lake Manyara. Whether it’s a quick getaway or a full wildlife adventure, we’ve got a package that’s right for you.

Zanzibar Beach Holidays Package from Africa Rise Safaris

Escape to the exotic shores of Zanzibar with Africa Rise Safaris and indulge in the ultimate beach holiday experience. Our Zanzibar Beach Holidays Package offers the perfect blend of relaxation, culture, and adventure on one of the most beautiful islands in the Indian Ocean. Whether you’re winding down after a thrilling safari in Tanzania or looking for a romantic getaway, Zanzibar’s white-sand beaches, turquoise waters, and rich Swahili heritage provide an unforgettable escape.

Services

Top Services We Offer!

At Africa Rise Safaris, we specialize in creating unforgettable experiences across East Africa. From thrilling wildlife safaris and mountain treks to beach escapes and cultural tours — our top-rated services are designed to match every traveler’s dream and budget.

1. Wildlife Safaris

Guided safaris to top parks like Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, and Lake Manyara. Options include budget camping, mid-range lodges, and luxury experiences.

2. Mountain Climbing

Kilimanjaro and Mount Meru treks via all major routes. Full support with guides, porters, and equipment for safe and successful climbs.

3. Beach Holidays

Relaxing beach packages to Zanzibar, Mafia, and Pangani, including spice tours, snorkeling, diving, and cultural visits.

4. Cultural & Day Tours

Short trips to local attractions like Materuni Waterfalls, hot springs, and cultural villages with tribes like the Maasai and Chaga.

❓ Have a Question About a Safari or Tour?

Whether you’re curious about the best time to visit Tanzania, need help choosing a safari package, or want to customize your own itinerary, our team is here for you. At Africa Rise Safaris, we’re passionate about helping you plan a safe, exciting, and unforgettable journey. Don’t hesitate to reach out — we’re happy to answer any questions and guide you every step of the way!

Ask via Email!

Africa Rise Safaris

Africa Rise Safaris

Africa Rise Safaris serves a diverse range of travelers—solo adventurers, couples, families, groups, photographers, and volunteers—offering flexible itineraries and professional support from start to finish. Every trip is carefully crafted to reflect the traveler’s interests, budget, and timeframe, with a focus on quality service and genuine African hospitality.
